title: dacrycarpus cumingii
intro: Dacrycarpus cumingii, also known as the Philippine pine or yellow pine, is a species of coniferous tree that belongs to the family Podocarpaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dacrycarpus cumingii include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves and resin of the plant can be used to make tea, infusions, and ointments, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
